query: Calculate 7! (factorial of 7) by writing a loop, then use search_kb to look up each integer from 1 to 7 and count the number of search results, returning both the factorial and the lookup count.
referenceAnswer: 7! = 5040. The sandbox should complete the factorial computation and call search_kb up to 7 times within the tool-call budget, returning both the factorial result and the count of successful lookups.
